traditionalUsesEn: Culinary vegetable; traditional cough syrups and poultices in folk medicine.
traditionalUsesDe: Küchengemüse; traditionelle Hustensäfte und Umschläge in der Volksmedizin.
preparation: Raw or cooked food; traditional honey-onion syrups.
cautions: Food use safe for most. Eye irritation when cutting.
historicalNotes: Fundamental Eurasian crop of cuisine and folk care.
preparationDe: Raw oder gekocht food; traditionell honey-onion Sirupe.
cautionsDe: Food use safe für most. Eye irritation when cutting.
historicalNotesDe: Fundamental Eurasian crop von cuisine und folk care.
